title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: A video explanation of Pi Agent, an AI agent framework that enables unique approaches to task harnessing. The video compares Pi against other agent systems like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, discussing how it handles the complexity of harness layers in modern AI products.
